rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Middleware factories (create*Middleware) attach the underlying limiter instance as a property on the returned function (middleware.limiter = limiter) so tests can call mw.limiter.destroy() for cleanup","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Tests always use afterEach with vi.useRealTimers() to restore real timers after fake-timer tests, and call limiter?.destroy() on the instance under test.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Fake timers (vi.useFakeTimers()) are called inside individual tests, not in a beforeEach — each test manages its own timer state independently.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"cleanupTimer.unref() must be called on setInterval cleanup timers so the Node process can exit even with an active interval.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"New SimpleRateLimiter reuses the existing byIp helper from rate-limiter.ts via import r
